mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password_hash AS passwordHash, role, status, employee_id AS employeeId, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username}

SELECT u.id AS u_id, u.username AS u_username, u.password_hash AS u_password_hash, u.role AS u_role, u.status AS u_status, u.employee_id AS u_employee_id, u.create_time AS u_create_time, u.update_time AS u_update_time, e.id AS e_id, e.employee_no AS e_employee_no, e.name AS e_name, e.department_id AS e_department_id, e.position AS e_position, e.phone AS e_phone, e.status AS e_status, e.hire_date AS e_hire_date, e.create_time AS e_create_time, e.update_time AS e_update_time, d.name AS d_name FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN oa_employee e ON u.employee_id = e.id LEFT JOIN sys_department d ON e.department_id = d.id WHERE u.id = #{id}
SELECT id, username, password_hash AS passwordHash, role, status, employee_id AS employeeId, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM sys_user WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user (username, password_hash, role, status, employee_id) VALUES (#{username}, #{passwordHash}, #{role}, #{status}, #{employeeId})
